gist.headline: The hive is cooking
gist.blurb: Madlisten just landed in the app showcase. It's a recipe browser built on our infrastructure, proving once again that AI and food are a natural pairing.
gist.summary: Added Madlisten, a recipe browsing application, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: The community showcase grows by one more app, giving users a new way to discover and view recipes.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a recipe app to the community showcase. The visual should feature the pollinations bee in a culinary setting, perhaps wearing a chef's hat and looking at a recipe book or cooking pot, blending tech and food.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny white chef's hat, reading a glowing recipe book in a warm rustic kitchen. A chunky retro monitor on the wooden counter displays pixelated food and code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
